name: Three-Bean and Tuna Salad
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces cannellini beans, rinsed and drained
15 ounces great northern beans, rinsed and drained
15 ounces kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1/4 cup olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the rinsed and drained beans (cannellini, great northern, and kidney) with chopped bell pepper, onion, and parsley.
2. In a tightly covered container, shake together olive or vegetable oil, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 tablespoons capers, and 1/4 teaspoon red pepper sauce.
3. Toss the oil mixture with the bean mixture.
4. Spoon the salad onto lettuce leaves.
5. Top each portion with tuna.
6. Serve with lemon wedges if desired.
